overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a space suit moving through a dimly lit space station interior. The character exits a small room with warm lighting into a corridor with green emergency lighting, approaching an orange-lit doorway at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact crew quarters with industrial shelving

events.description: character turns toward the slatted door and begins walking to exit the room

agents.ego_description: moving around a small room, examining the space, and approaching the exit door

entered.detail: industrial ceiling fan with multiple blades hanging from the ceiling
tall metal wire shelving unit against the back wall with various items
wooden slatted partition door leading to the corridor
small desk or table with objects on it in the foreground area

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a small, dimly lit room with warm artificial lighting. A ceiling fan rotates overhead, and metal shelving lines the back wall. The character turns and walks toward a slatted wooden door on the right side of the room, preparing to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station corridor with emergency lighting

events.description: character exits the small room through the slatted door into a green-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow corridor toward an illuminated doorway at the far end

entered.detail: metal door frame and bulkhead structure marking the transition into the hallway
green-tinted emergency lights running along the corridor walls
white bags or bundled items lying on the corridor floor
open doorway at the end of the corridor emitting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the doorway into a narrow corridor illuminated by green emergency lighting. The walls are lined with industrial panels and emergency light strips. White bags lie scattered on the floor. Ahead, an open doorway emits a warm orange glow, contrasting with the cool green corridor lighting, which the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy, dimly lit interior into a sterile, industrial corridor bathed in contrasting emergency lights. It begins in a small room with warm artificial lighting, where a ceiling fan rotates above metal shelving as the character turns toward a slatted wooden door. As the character passes through the doorway, the environment shifts abruptly into a narrow hallway illuminated by cool green emergency strips and lined with industrial panels. The camera then tracks forward past white bags scattered across the floor, moving deeper into the green glow. The scene finally culminates as the character approaches an open doorway at the end of the hall, which emits a warm orange light that cuts through the corridor's green hue.
